title: Chiang Rai、Chiang Rai — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Chiang Rai、Chiang Raiの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Chiang RaiはChiang Raiにある人口200,000の都市です。A tranquil northern city known for its stunning White Temple, lush mountains, and very low cost of living, popular with retirees and off-the-beaten-path travelers.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
